# viettelidc_vdbs_backup (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Backup ID (UUID)

### Read-Only

- `block_storage_size_gb` (Number) Block storage size in GB
- `block_storage_used_gb` (Number) Block storage used in GB
- `description` (String) Backup description
- `instance_id` (String) Related database instance ID
- `instance_name` (String) Related database instance name
- `name` (String) Backup name
- `object_storage_size_gb` (Number) Object storage size in GB
- `object_storage_used_gb` (Number) Object storage used in GB
- `service_init_id` (Number) Service init ID
- `status` (String) Backup status (ACTIVE, INACTIVE, etc)
- `threshold` (Number) Backup threshold percentage
- `vpc_id` (Number) VPC ID
- `vpc_name` (String) VPC name
